Name: Jasper MCH Events
Description: General-purpose Machinist event profile for PvE. Broken references and field-content-specific events were removed for stable roulette and raid use.

Events.Name: Reset Toggles
Events.Description: Restores normal Machinist ACR toggles while safely out of combat.

Events.Name: Head Graze Interrupt
Events.Description: Uses Head Graze on casting enemies in range.

Logics.Name: Reset Toggles
Logics.Description: Restores normal Machinist ACR toggles while safely out of combat.

Logics.Name: Head Graze Interrupt
Logics.Description: Uses Head Graze on casting enemies in range.
